judge_result.short_rationale: Includes all required actions in correct order: rinse eye 15-20 minutes while holding open, remove contacts after 5 minutes, then call doctor/poison control immediately. No unsafe added advice. Usability is reduced by hedging and overly explanatory wording for an urgent first-aid situation.
